content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's got that skinny, bookish look — glasses, flannel, always a little rumpled, like he forgot to sleep again. He's smarter than he acts and plays guitar better than he probably knows. We met on the rooftop at some ridiculous hour — me finishing a workout, him finishing a song. We don't talk much, which is why it works. I think he's stuck on something — a girl, a decision, I don't know. I don't pry. He probably sees me as the quiet gym guy upstairs. I see him as decent company who doesn't need me to perform. I know his job situation is bad.
